sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The sequence was stopped early after 11 actions (the 12th was N selection which had no impact). Let me check the current state.
Looking at the image:
- Red box: O, N, p, b, M (5 slots filled: orange, green, purple, blue, magenta)
- Green box: R, Y (red, yellow - 2 slots filled)
- Blue box: 2 empty slots (gray dots)
So my placement worked for red and green boxes! The remaining colors to place are N and b in the blue box. But the sequence was stopped when trying to select N (because it had no impact - N was already placed in the red box).
Wait, looking at the palette at the bottom: the colors O, p, M, R, Y are now grayed out (they've been used). N and b are still available (green and blue squares).
So I need to place N and b in the blue box. Let me do that.
Blue box empty slots: (35,37) and (35,43)
Palette: N at (57,16), b at (57,37)

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Red box filled: O, N, p, b, M ✓
# Green box filled: R, Y ✓
# Blue box: 2 empty slots, need N and b
# Palette: N at (57,16), b at (57,37) still available

action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 16},   # select N
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 37},   # blue box slot 0
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 37},   # select b
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 43},   # blue box slot 1
    {'action': 'SPACE'},
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
